assertions.title: Copy-text-button and public-profile-form pills use semantic tokens

steps.expected: Pill class strings use bg-muted and dark:bg-secondary
steps.observed: Both files use bg-muted with dark:bg-secondary in the pill button class strings.

steps.action: Inspect branch diff against origin/main for both files
steps.expected: Old bg-neutral-50 / dark:border-neutral-500 / dark:bg-neutral-600 tokens were replaced
steps.observed: Diff shows both files changed from bg-neutral-50 + dark:border-neutral-500 + dark:bg-neutral-600 to bg-muted + dark:bg-secondary.

steps.action: Run exact boundary token search for removed pill classes
steps.expected: No remaining exact matches for bg-neutral-50, dark:border-neutral-500, or dark:bg-neutral-600 in either file

evidence.codeInspection: copy-text-button.tsx:47 and public-profile-form.tsx:174 currently use bg-muted ... dark:bg-secondary.
evidence.diffInspection: Branch diff shows the old neutral pill classes replaced with semantic tokens in both files.
evidence.searchChecks: Exact boundary rg searches found no remaining bg-neutral-50, dark:border-neutral-500, or dark:bg-neutral-600 tokens in either file.

assertions.title: Template direct-link badge uses semantic tokens

steps.expected: Badge class strings use border-border bg-muted and dark:bg-secondary
steps.observed: Both badge render sites use rounded border border-border bg-muted ... dark:bg-secondary.

steps.action: Inspect branch diff against origin/main for both files
steps.expected: Old border-neutral-300 / bg-neutral-200 / dark:border-neutral-500 / dark:bg-neutral-600 tokens were replaced
steps.observed: Diff shows both files changed from border-neutral-300 + bg-neutral-200 + dark:border-neutral-500 + dark:bg-neutral-600 to border-border + bg-muted + dark:bg-secondary.

steps.action: Run exact boundary token search for removed badge classes
steps.expected: No remaining exact matches for border-neutral-300, bg-neutral-200, dark:border-neutral-500, or dark:bg-neutral-600 in either file

evidence.codeInspection: template-direct-link-badge.tsx:39 and templates-table.tsx:139 use border-border bg-muted ... dark:bg-secondary.
evidence.diffInspection: Branch diff shows both direct-link badge sites replaced raw neutral tokens with semantic tokens.
evidence.searchChecks: Exact boundary rg searches found no remaining border-neutral-300, bg-neutral-200, dark:border-neutral-500, or dark:bg-neutral-600 tokens in either file.

assertions.title: Badge neutral variant uses semantic tokens

steps.expected: Neutral variant uses bg-muted text-muted-foreground ring-border/50
steps.observed: badge.tsx neutral variant is bg-muted text-muted-foreground ring-border/50.

steps.action: Inspect branch diff against origin/main for badge.tsx
steps.expected: Old gray neutral badge tokens were replaced
steps.observed: Diff shows the neutral variant changed from gray palette classes to bg-muted text-muted-foreground ring-border/50.

steps.action: Run exact boundary token search for removed gray badge classes
steps.expected: No remaining exact matches for bg-gray-50, text-gray-600, ring-gray-500/10, dark:bg-gray-400/10, dark:text-gray-400, or dark:ring-gray-400/20

evidence.codeInspection: badge.tsx:13 sets neutral to bg-muted text-muted-foreground ring-border/50.
evidence.diffInspection: Branch diff shows the neutral variant replaced all old gray palette classes.
evidence.searchChecks: Exact boundary rg search found no removed gray neutral badge tokens in badge.tsx.

assertions.title: User profile skeletons use consistent semantic tokens

steps.expected: Targeted locations use bg-muted, divide-border, and border-border
steps.observed: Both files now use bg-muted on the card/header and divide-border + border-border on the table wrapper.

steps.action: Inspect branch diff against origin/main for both files
steps.expected: Mixed bg-neutral / divide-neutral / border-neutral / dark:divide-foreground / dark:border-foreground tokens were replaced
steps.observed: Diff shows the targeted neutral, divider, and border tokens were replaced with semantic tokens in both files.

steps.action: Run exact boundary token search for removed skeleton/profile classes
steps.expected: No remaining exact matches for bg-neutral-100, bg-neutral-50, divide-neutral-200, border-neutral-200, dark:divide-foreground/30, or dark:border-foreground/30
steps.observed: No exact matches remained in either file.

evidence.codeInspection: user-profile-skeleton.tsx and user-profile-timur.tsx both use bg-muted / divide-border / border-border in the targeted locations.
evidence.diffInspection: Branch diff shows both files replaced the targeted mixed neutral tokens with semantic tokens.
evidence.searchChecks: Exact boundary rg search found no removed neutral/divider/border tokens in either file.

assertions.title: Document signing page v2 uses semantic background

steps.observed: The outer page wrapper uses min-h-screen w-screen bg-muted dark:bg-background.

steps.action: Inspect branch diff against origin/main for document-signing-page-view-v2.tsx
steps.observed: Diff shows bg-gray-50 dark:bg-background changed to bg-muted dark:bg-background.

steps.action: Run exact boundary token search for bg-gray-50
steps.expected: No remaining exact bg-gray-50 token in the file

evidence.diffInspection: Branch diff shows bg-gray-50 was replaced with bg-muted on the page wrapper.
evidence.searchChecks: Exact boundary rg search found no bg-gray-50 token in the file.

assertions.title: No unintended changes to preserved files

steps.action: Collect preserved/off-limits paths from mission.md and validation-contract.md
steps.expected: Use the mission preserve list as the diff allowlist boundary
steps.observed: Preserved paths were identified for recipient colors, email, docs, dark-mode-disabled/theme config, document-dropzone, stack-avatar, envelope-editor toolbar, chart files, and tailwind config files.

steps.action: Run git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD on the preserved path set
steps.expected: No preserved paths appear in the branch diff
steps.observed: The diff command returned no file paths.

steps.action: Run repo-wide searches for .dark-mode-disabled and hsl(var(--primary)) preserved references
steps.expected: If references exist, the containing preserved files should still be absent from the branch diff
steps.observed: Searches found only preserved theme/config/chart files, and none appeared in the branch diff.

evidence.diffInspection: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD over the preserved path set returned no output.
evidence.searchChecks: Repo-wide searches for .dark-mode-disabled and hsl(var(--primary)) only surfaced preserved files, none of which were changed.

frictions.description: Contract example strings are conceptual rather than exact byte-for-byte class lists; class order and extra non-target tokens (for example an additional border class) made exact full-string greps unreliable, and naive literal searches like bg-neutral-50 can also match longer tokens such as bg-neutral-500.
frictions.resolution: Used file reads plus branch diff inspection and exact boundary rg --pcre2 searches for removed tokens instead of depending on single full-string greps.

summary: Tested 6 assertions via code and diff inspection: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
